query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       COUNT(DISTINCT se.id) AS complete_events,
       COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS detail_events,
       COUNT(DISTINCT se.id) - COUNT(DISTINCT psd.stationEventId) AS missing_events,
       SUM(CASE WHEN se.categoryId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_category_events
FROM station_events se
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.stationCode = 'B'
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
  AND se.countForProductivity = 1
  AND se.businessDate >= '2026-05-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY business_date DESC;
